# PERF-121 negative: use a direct type conversion
lang: go
file: PERF-121-safe.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

type Config struct {
	Host string
	Port int
}

type Options struct {
	Host string
	Port int
}

func toOptions(c Config) Options {
	return Options(c)
}

func independentOptions(c Config) Options {
	return Options{
		Host: c.Host,
		Port: 8080,
	}
}

func commentedOptions(c, other Config) Options {
	src := Config{Host: c.Host, Port: c.Port}
	return Options{
		Host: other.Host, // Host: src.Host
		Port: other.Port, // Port: src.Port
	}
}
